title: Galactic Unown
description: A combination data pack/resource pack that adds Unown in the shape of the Standard Galactic Alphabet.
body:
**Galactic Unown** is a combination data/resource pack that adds new forms to the Symbol Pokemon, Unown. Based on the Standard Galactic Alphabet, these Unown embody randomness and can only use Metronome. 

- **Galactic Unown** must be installed as both a datapack and resource pack in order to function properly

Enjoy this resource pack? Be sure to check out my other work: [Colorful Unown Shinies](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colorful-unown-shinies)!

**Questions or Comments?**

Be sure to join Cobblemon's Discord and share your thoughts in "Ian's things" under the forum channel named "content-zone-help"
